RULING:
No other appearance on this matter. The Court's tentative ruling was "hearing required". Therefore, The Court overruled DEFENDANTs VICTORIA D. MARROQUIN, Berta Chilaca, Josiel Chilaca and Arely Chilaca's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, 5 days to answer. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (DAG/301/DR) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
